name: Euskaltel, S.A.
summary: Euskaltel, S.A. provides telecommunications services to individuals, institutions, and companies in Spain. The company offers ICT solutions, including internet, fixed-line and mobile phones, digital TV and broadband, and digital transformation services; internet of things solutions; big data and artificial intelligence solutions; and technologies for smart cities and industry 4.0 to residential and business customers. The company provides its services to a market of 6 million people. Euskaltel, S.A. was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Derio, Spain.
